title: saussurea roylei
intro: Saussurea roylei, also known as Royle's Saussurea or Himalayan Inula, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Saussurea roylei include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Saussurea roylei include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the plant's leaves, flowers, and roots.
